details:
First release of the web-based tracker.
- Tracking for Quests, Gear, Lich Gear, Incarnons, Arcanes, Mods, Subsumes, Railjack, Modular Gear, Relics, Blueprints, Items, Cosmetics, Collectables, Decorations, Codex, Market and Extra
- Dashboard with overall and per-category progress
- Per-section settings to include or exclude categories from your overall percentage

Visual overhaul and several new features:
- Refined dark theme across the whole app
- Live World State panel showing current Cetus, Vallis, Cambion and Zariman cycles â€” updates automatically when a cycle ends
- Command palette (Ctrl+K): search any item across all categories instantly
- Screenshot scan: upload an in-game screenshot and the tracker will attempt to auto-check matching items via OCR
- Incarnon page redesigned with week groups, per-family checkboxes, and current week highlighted
- Task Checklist added
- Fixed Lich Gear dashboard progress sometimes exceeding 100%

New features and fixes:
- Floating Pinned Bar: a configurable bar you can pin to the screen showing World State cycles and your Task Checklist at a glance
- Gear variants (e.g. Wraith, Vandal, Prisma) now grouped into collapsible families
- Tracker rows can now be individually toggled open for more granular sub-item tracking
- Exilus Adapter tracking added to Gear
- Arcanes now support per-rank tracking for Psycho and Hoarder collection modes
- Sidebar shows badge counts for pages with unfinished items while collapsed
- Fixed dashboard section totals not respecting your settings

description: Mobile Layout, New Theme & Command Palette Improvements
details:
Quality-of-life update focused on accessibility and polish:
- Mobile-responsive layout: sidebar, tables and panels now adapt to small screens
- New Neutral-Dark theme variant; theme can be switched directly from the sidebar
- Command palette now supports multi-word fuzzy search and indexes more item types
- Data corrections: arcane sections reorganised, Sirocco removed from Primary Weapons, Sporothrix typo fixed, duplicate weapon entries removed
- Checklist task descriptions restored to their original in-game phrasing

description: Honoria Titles, What's Next & Tracker Table Filters
details:
New page, dashboard widget and table improvements:
- Honoria Titles: new page tracking all Honoria title unlocks, integrated into the dashboard and overall progress
- "What's Next" dashboard widget highlighting partially completed categories so you always know where to focus
- Tracker tables now support filter and sort controls, plus column icon badges
- Fixed dashboard card order to match sidebar navigation

description: Mods Overhaul — Tracker Table, Categories & Data Audit
details:
Full rework of the Mods page backed by a complete wiki audit:
- Mods page migrated to the unified tracker-table layout with Owned, Maxed and Hoarder Rank columns
- All 1489 mods categorised by equipment slot (Warframe, Primary, Secondary, Melee, Companion, Archwing, etc.)
- Augments split into a dedicated Augment category with per-Warframe groups, replacing the previous flat list
- Collapsible per-category tables matching the Arcanes layout; all sections can now be fully collapsed
- Added Conclave as a distinct mod category
- 200+ mod category misassignments corrected following a full wiki audit (141 initial pass + 74 follow-up + 7 Conclave corrections)
- Mods sorted by category then alphabetically within each group

description: Relics Tracker Table, Lich Ephemera & Wiki Links
details:
Further tracker improvements and data additions:
- Relics page migrated to tracker-table with dedicated Owned and Radiant columns
- Lich Gear: Adversary Ephemera sections added for Kuva and Tenet liches, synced with the Collectables page
- World State: migrated to the tenno.tools API after warframestat.us became unavailable
- Tracker tables now show wiki links for each item (can be toggled off in settings)

New section for the Atragraph cosmetic foil system:
- Atragraph page tracking all foil mod families, integrated into the dashboard, sidebar, command palette and overall progress
- Standard mode tracks one foil per mod family; optional Collector mode (in settings) tracks the foil on every compatible mod variant
- Section can be toggled on or off from settings like every other category

Broad quality-of-life pass across the whole app:
- Tracker tables: group sections are now collapsible — click any category header to expand or collapse it
- Tracker tables: bulk column toggle now requires a two-step confirmation to prevent accidental mass-check
- Tracker tables: completed rows no longer show strikethrough text (dim opacity is sufficient)
- Search result count shown on Mods, Arcanes, Gear, Incarnon and Lich Gear pages when a filter is active
- Sidebar: disabled sections collapsed into a single “N sections hidden” toggle instead of a full dimmed list
- Sidebar: WF TRACKER logo now navigates to the dashboard
- Sidebar: active page indicator visible when sidebar is collapsed
- Sidebar: rank title (Baby Tenno → True Completionist) displayed below the progress bar
- Sidebar: theme toggle label reworded to clearly describe the action rather than the current state
- Dashboard: “What’s Next” section shows a placeholder for users who haven’t started tracking yet
- Dashboard: disabled section cards now link to Settings with an “Enable in Settings” hint
- Dashboard: overall progress bar increased to 14 px with a gold gradient fill
- Settings: a “✓ Saved” confirmation flashes after any setting is changed

New content additions:
- Warframes: Styanax Prime; Sirius & Orion as a dual-frame entry with shared shard/tau columns and separate build tracking
- Incarnon: Week 9 rotation added (Stug, Vectis, Obex, Destreza, Ballistica)
- Arcanes: Sculptor, Compression, Assimilation, Cryogenic
- Mods: Kumihimo Loading, Rhythm Guard, Reroot Rampage, Noctua Swarm (Warframe Augments)
- Gear: War Prime added
- Honoria: Pontis Tower section (8 titles); Make Your Own Fate event title (Gift of the Lotus Alert)
- Cosmetics: Syndir and Viserakta ephemera; Jade's Victory syandana; Bladeswarm weapon skins (Braton, Karyst, Kunai, Vectis); Bloodfrenzy weapon skins (Ballistica, Nagantaka, Venka)
- Signas: Kyzen and Karotic added
- Removed: Scan Screenshot page
